channel.title: Papers on Onur Copur
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Onur Copur

item.title: Combinatorial optimization with Deep Learning
item.description: POINTER NETWORKS https://arxiv.org/pdf/1506.03134.pdf NEURAL COMBINATORIAL OPTIMIZATION WITH REINFORCEMENT LEARNING https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Bk9mxlSFx ATTENTION, LEARN TO SOLVE ROUTING PROBLEMS! https://arxiv.org/pdf/1803.08475v3.pdf

item.title: Papers that I like
item.description: Combinatorial Optimization with DL Routing Problems Pointer Networks Neural Combinatorial Optimization with deep learning Attention, Learn to Solve Routing Problems Machine Learning for Combinatorial Optimization: a Methodological Tour d’Horizon Computer Vision Emotion Recognition Emotion Understanding in Videos Through Body, Context, and Visual-Semantic Embedding Loss Action Recognition Temporal Segment Networks: Towards Good Practices for Deep Action Recognition
